item.name: Applications

description.content: Create and manage Resilience Hub applications.

item.name: Amazon Resilience Hub Create App

request.name: Amazon Resilience Hub Create App

description.content: Creates an AWS Resilience Hub application. A Resilience Hub application is a collection of AWS resources structured to prevent and recover AWS application disruptions.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Resilience Hub Describe App

request.name: Amazon Resilience Hub Describe App

description.content: Describes an AWS Resilience Hub application.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Resilience Hub List Apps

request.name: Amazon Resilience Hub List Apps

description.content: Lists your Resilience Hub applications.

query.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the app.
Maximum number of results to include in the response.
Null, or the token from a previous call to get the next set of results.
The name for the one of the listed applications.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Resilience Hub Delete App

request.name: Amazon Resilience Hub Delete App

description.content: Deletes an AWS Resilience Hub application. This is a destructive action that cannot be undone.

query.description: (Required) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the application.
A boolean option to override the failure when deleting an unprotected app.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

AWS Resilience Hub provides a central place to define, validate, and track the resilience of your AWS applications, assessing against RTO and RPO targets and providing actionable recommendations.
